sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n14611" key="a)pw/leutos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀπώλευτος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, of horses, <sense id="n14611.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">unbroken,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Anon.</author> </bibl> ap. <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Suid.</author> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
